name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DistributedSnapshot ----

EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets, Sequences

CONSTANT P
VARIABLES chanMsg, finished, markersSent, procState


(* Types *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ procState : DOMAIN(P)
          --> {"recorded","unrec"}
    /\ chanMsg : (DOMAIN(P)->DOMAIN(P)) \in SUBSET(Seq("msg"))
    (* For simplicity we treat any string as normal msg "marker" reserved word used below *)

Init ==  
    /\ UNCHANGED <<procState>>
    /\ procState = [{p \in P |->
            IF p IN FIRST(SUBSETS(P,{}) ) THEN "recorded"

    /* Initially only one process records its local state */
    /\ chanMsg = [x \in DOMAIN(P), y \in DOMAIN(P) |
                    x # y => [] ]
    /\ markersSent = FALSE
    /\ finished = FALSE

Next ==
   \/ (\* Process initiates recording and sends markers to all neighbors *\*
         /\ EXISTS src \in P :
                /\ procState[src]="unrec"
                /\ procState' = [procState EXCEPT ![src] = @ ^ ("recorded")]
                /\ markersSent'=TRUE 
           )
     \/ (\* Marker propagation: if a marker arrives on channel from u->v, v processes it *\*
        /\ EXISTS {u,v} \subseteq P:
              /\ chanMsg[u][v].head="marker"
              /\ procState[v]="unrec"
              /\ procState'[v] ="recorded"
              /\ chanMsg'[u][v]=TL(chanMsg[u][v])
          )
     \/ (\* Normal message passing after snapshot started but before completion *\*
        /\ EXISTS {a,b}\subseteq P :  (* any directed edge *)
             /\ chanMsg[a][b]\#[]  
             /\ LET msg == Head(chanMsg[a][b]) IN
                 IF (msg="#") THEN UNCHANGED <<chanMsg>>

                     /\ chanMsg'=[c,d | c=d -> TL(If(c=a & d=b) then chanMsg[c][d]

    )

Spec ==
   Init /\
   []<>(Next)

====
